hero.title: Crafting digital experiences with code & creativity
hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Octavyan Putra Ramadhan — a Fullstack Developer building modern, performant web products with a love for motion and detail.

home.aboutBody: I design and build products end-to-end — from pixel-perfect interfaces to robust APIs. I care deeply about craft, motion, and user experience. Currently focused on Next.js, TanStack, and modern animation systems.
